title: La Habitación Negra
overview: Camila, an influencer obsessed with fame, is kidnapped and forced to livestream her own isolation, while an anonymous audience decides her fate. Trapped in The Black Room, she will face humiliating challenges and extreme trials that will test her will and her identity. What seems like a cruel game is revealed to be part of an even more macabre spectacle, where fame comes at a price and entertainment knows no limits.
